untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders pattern detection requires multi-point structural analysis (identifying peaks A, C, E and computing distance ratios D1/D2) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based indicators and simple comparison operators. Pattern detection logic requires candlestick or chart pattern recognition not available in the allowed indicator set. The distance_ratio symmetry threshold (max_distance_ratio: 4.0) and neckline violation detection require pattern geometry computation beyond scalar indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Signal requires advanced pattern recognition capabilities. Recommend implementing a dedicated head-and-shoulders detection module that: (1) identifies local peaks/troughs, (2) validates shoulder symmetry with Max(D1,D2)/Min(D1,D2) ≤ 4.0, (3) detects neckline from pattern low points, (4) triggers entry on neckline confirmation and exits on neckline breach. Direction is context-dependent based on whether pattern is inverted (bearish vs bullish).
